task_completion.description: Upload the CSV manifest to Snipe-IT
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Snipe-IT 'Import' page with the file 'import_manifest.csv' selected or uploaded.

task_completion.description: Map the required fields during the import process
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Snipe-IT import mapping interface showing columns like Model, Category, Status, Location, Purchase Date, and Cost matched to their corresponding Snipe-IT database fields.
Screenshot showing a success message indicating items were imported, or the 'All Assets' page listing the newly imported assets from the manifest.

task_completion.description: Update the serial number for asset ENG-LAB-003
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the asset details or edit page for 'ENG-LAB-003' showing its Serial Number field set to 'SN-DL7090-4523'.

task_completion.description: Update the serial number for asset ENG-LAB-008
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the asset details or edit page for 'ENG-LAB-008' showing its Serial Number field set to 'SN-DL5530-9902'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the import and updates
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that the Snipe-IT web interface is visible in a browser window, rather than terminal commands executing SQL or API requests.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should check that the agent is interacting with the Snipe-IT web application, not just editing the CSV file in a text editor or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should ensure no terminal windows are open showing scripts (e.g., Python, bash, curl) being used to automate the import or update process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/import_manifest.csv'. The serial number for asset ENG-LAB-003 must be updated to 'SN-DL7090-4523'. The serial number for asset ENG-LAB-008 must be updated to 'SN-DL5530-9902'.
